text:
Created attachment 238020
poudriere testport log

There is new version of www/py-httpcore which works with py-h11-0.14.0.

So I made a patch wich was tested with poudriere - poudriere log is attached also.

This port must be updated because it is not possible to make pkg now while py-h11 was upgraded in ports tree.
